role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and vegetation density.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant types (acacia, scrub) and biome.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road width, shoulders, and pole infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (pole style, camera generation) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the Sub-Saharan African region but failed to identify the specific country (Argentina). The failure was driven by a strong regional bias (Sahel) and hallucinated infrastructure details (concrete poles) that did not match the image.

regulatory: regulatory agent claimed 'Wooden utility poles with T-shaped cross-arms' (Image shows concrete pole with simple cross-arm)
regulatory agent claimed 'specific wooden utility pole cross-arm style' (Image shows concrete pole)
meta: meta agent claimed 'concrete utility pole with simple horizontal cross-arm' (Correct)
meta agent claimed 'Gen 3 Google Street View camera quality' (Unverifiable/Hallucinated metadata)

visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Failed to describe the utility pole material correctly (claimed wood, image shows concrete).
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Mixed; correctly identified pole shape but hallucinated camera generation.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: Argentina was not in the candidate pool.
